title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell (CEO of Cursor) discusses the evolution of software engineering toward AI-driven autonomous agents. He cites data showing 30% of Cursor's pull requests are fully agent-developed end-to-end, enterprise code went from 15% to 75% AI-generated in one year, and engineers are transitioning to agent management roles.
